statistical_strength_at_60pct: marginal-positive (CI lower bound just above 0 at 0.035)
statistical_strength_at_50pct: positive but statistically weaker / CI crosses zero (delta_ci_low=-0.0262)
key_finding: Break-even retention ~0.5. At 60% retention: R4 wins 98.6% of bootstraps (delta=+0.1408, CI=[+0.035, +0.28]) — marginal-positive, CI lower bound just above 0. At 50%: R4 wins 94.2% of bootstraps (delta=+0.1137, CI=[-0.0262, +0.2553]) — positive point estimate but statistically weaker, CI crosses zero. R4 advantage is robust because LLM F1 is already near zero, but the 50% retention result should NOT be reported as a robust pass; it is a directional signal pending gold confirmation.
